div.p: Specification: High-Performance Asynchronous Persistence Layer Implementation Context: Golang dirty-page tracking with exponential backoff.
Behavior: Set() updates local cache + dirty_map and returns 200 OK.

ul.li: Async write of extracted batch to DB
Concurrent writes land in the new map

div.p: Non-Blocking Guarantee: The Set() call must never block unless the Hard Limit (128MB) is hit. This provides determinism for the application thread.
Crash Safety: Non-persisted dirty_map data is not durable across crashes unless WAL is enabled on Set().
